_publications._publicationTitle: Hybrid Minigene Assay: An Efficient Tool to Characterize mRNA Splicing Profiles of

_contextSnippet: The synonym variant c.5694G > A p.(Glu1898=) was predicted to affect splicing by both the software tools we employed...these synonym variants, when expressed from the minigene construct, did not affect transcript maturation
details: Predicted splicing alteration for synonym variant c.5694G > A p.(Glu1898=), but minigene assay showed no effect on transcript maturation, indicating false positive prediction
